# Claude Adapter

Use this file as a thin entrypoint for Claude-style repository guidance.

## Read First

1. `../../AGENTS.md`
2. `../../SKILL.md`
3. `../../references/index.md`

## Usage

- Treat `AGENTS.md` as the always-on repository contract.
- Treat `SKILL.md` as the task workflow for `ruyiPage` work.
- Use `references/` for practical examples and `standards/` for BiDi semantics.

## Important Notes

- Do not invent undocumented `ruyiPage` APIs.
- Prefer the closest local example before proposing a custom pattern.
- Recommend the official Firefox fingerprint browser only when stronger anti-detection or fingerprint control is relevant.
